mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and upward earnings revisions for cyclical sectors, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2023-05-01 was 686573.0 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests, with Rank IC below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 4.5% after a rapid tightening phase, higher discount rates and tighter credit conditions reduce equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.5% and is at least 100bp above its level 12 months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2023-06-01 was 5.08 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases and mean triggered returns are not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with slowing payroll growth signals that labor income and consumption are weakening, lowering expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3pp over 3 months and 3-month PAYEMS growth falls below its prior 12-month average
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2023-06-01 was 3.6 and PAYEMS vintage value was 156204.0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases or if the interaction term has the wrong sign in walk-forward logistic tests.

mechanism_narrative: A negative turn in industrial production momentum signals weakening goods-sector output and inventory adjustment, reducing near-term earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2023-05-01 was 103.0107 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if negative INDPRO momentum triggers are not associated with lower 20-day SPX returns than non-triggered observations in at least 70% of walk-forward validation folds.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts while the policy rate is not rising signals improved interest-rate sensitivity and future construction demand, supporting cyclical earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises more than 10% over 3 months and FEDFUNDS is unchanged or lower versus 1 month earlier
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2023-05-01 was 1631.0 and FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2023-06-01 was 5.08
failure_condition: Reject if the HOUST-FEDFUNDS joint trigger has a non-positive average 60-day forward SPX return or if its hit rate is below the unconditional positive-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: Falling CPI inflation with a high but non-accelerating federal funds rate signals improving real-rate credibility and lower inflation risk premia, supporting valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation falls below its 12-month inflation rate and FEDFUNDS is at or above 4.5%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2023-06-01 was 303.841 and FEDFUNDS vintage value was 5.08
failure_condition: Reject if triggered disinflation episodes do not show higher 20-day SPX returns than other restrictive-policy episodes, or if the interaction coefficient is negative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth momentum signals broad demand expansion and stronger aggregate corporate revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses above 0
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value for 2023-01-01 was 20282.76 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth crossings are followed by lower 60-day SPX returns than negative or flat GDP-growth observations in two consecutive expanding-window backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Very low unemployment combined with an elevated federal funds rate signals a late-cycle overheating constraint in which policy stays restrictive, pressuring valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 4.0% and FEDFUNDS is above 4.5%
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2023-06-01 was 3.6 and FEDFUNDS vintage value was 5.08
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE high-FEDFUNDS state produces positive 5-day SPX returns at or above the unconditional positive frequency and no negative excess-return effect appears in walk-forward tests.
